agentStop.bash: sh -c 'if ! command -v entire >/dev/null 2>&1; then exit 0; fi; exec entire hooks copilot-cli agent-stop'

errorOccurred.bash: sh -c 'if ! command -v entire >/dev/null 2>&1; then exit 0; fi; exec entire hooks copilot-cli error-occurred'

postToolUse.bash: sh -c 'if ! command -v entire >/dev/null 2>&1; then exit 0; fi; exec entire hooks copilot-cli post-tool-use'

preToolUse.bash: sh -c 'if ! command -v entire >/dev/null 2>&1; then exit 0; fi; exec entire hooks copilot-cli pre-tool-use'

sessionEnd.bash: sh -c 'if ! command -v entire >/dev/null 2>&1; then exit 0; fi; exec entire hooks copilot-cli session-end'

sessionStart.bash: sh -c 'if ! command -v entire >/dev/null 2>&1; then exit 0; fi; exec entire hooks copilot-cli session-start'

subagentStop.bash: sh -c 'if ! command -v entire >/dev/null 2>&1; then exit 0; fi; exec entire hooks copilot-cli subagent-stop'

userPromptSubmitted.bash: sh -c 'if ! command -v entire >/dev/null 2>&1; then exit 0; fi; exec entire hooks copilot-cli user-prompt-submitted'
